source.buildspec:
version: 0.2
phases:
  pre_build:
    commands:
      - echo Logging in to ECR...
      - aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | docker login --username AWS --password-stdin 943435462541.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com
  build:
    commands:
      - echo Building Docker image...
      - docker build -t plantillas-api .
      - docker tag plantillas-api:latest 943435462541.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/plantillas-api:latest
  post_build:
    commands:
      - echo Pushing to ECR...
      - docker push 943435462541.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/plantillas-api:latest
      - echo Done
